Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
North Island Credit Union Amphitheatre
Chula Vista, CA
Previous Names:
Coors Amphitheatre (Changed after 2007)
Cricket Wireless Amphitheatre (Changed after 2012)
Sleep Train Amphitheatre (Changed after 2016)
Mattress Firm Amphitheatre (Changed after 2018)
Seating Capacity: 19442
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 17
  DMB  (17)

Longest Performance:
08.26.06 - Two Step (22:38)

Song Liberations
  7.29.03 – Spoon (after 1711 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Coors Amphitheatre is located 17 minutes from downtown San Diego in Chula Vista, CA and is the area's first major concert facility designed specifically for music. The venue opened on July 21, 1998 as an outdoor performing arts theatre with reserved seating for 9,442 and additional seating for 10,000 on the lawn.

2050 Entertainment Cir.
Chula Vista, CA 91911
